The most difficult but noblest act of kindness is to repay evil with sincere prayer. 🙏🩹💖

Patience is the silence of the tongue when the heart is busy in dialogue with Allah seeking strength. 🤐🙏⚓
Love for the sake of Allah will never wither, because it is watered by prayers in the third part of the night. 💍🌌📿

Gratitude is a magnet that attracts other blessings to come for more. 🧲🤲🌈

Gentleness in actions is stronger to soften the heart than the harshness of words. 🍃🔨❤ ️

Your tongue is the one who determines your status; keep it moist with good words. 👅💎📿
